Bear Case Analysis: Advanced Packaging Overcapacity Risk

1. TSMC CoWoS capacity expansion may overshoot demand by H2 2026
2. Samsung and Intel rapidly expanding EMIB/Foveros alternatives
3. AI CapEx spending showing signs of moderation in recent earnings calls
4. HBM4 transition delays could reduce near-term packaging demand
5. Chinese domestic alternatives (JCET, Tongfu) adding capacity at lower costs
6. Customer dual-sourcing strategy reduces TSMC pricing power
7. CoWoS yield improvements could reduce wafer requirements per chip
